fontFamily.description: The font family applied to both light and dark themes.

families.description: Additional named theme families beyond the built-in 'default' family (synthesized from the top-level light/dark). Keyed by family id (e.g. 'stained', 'glass').

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the family selector. Falls back to the family key.

headerScheme.description: How the family's header handles text/icon contrast: 'dark' (light text on a saturated header), 'light' (dark text on a light header), or 'auto' (frosted header that follows the app light/dark mode). Omit to keep the historical reversed-children behavior.

defaultFamily.description: Operator default family key. Falls back to 'default' when unset or unknown.

logo.description: Properties to customize the site's logo, considering both light and dark modes.

src.description: The source of the logo image.

srcCollapsed.description: The source of the collapsed logo image.

srcDark.description: The source of the logo image in dark mode.

srcCollapsedDark.description: The source of the collapsed logo image in dark mode.

alt.description: The alt text for the logo image.

href.description: The URL that the logo links to.

width.description: The width of the logo image.

height.description: The height of the logo image.

width.description: The width of the collapsed logo image.

height.description: The height of the collapsed logo image.

loginLogoSrc.description: The source of the login form logo image for light mode. Falls back to srcDark, then the default hardcoded path.

loginLogoSrcDark.description: The source of the login form logo image for dark mode. Falls back to src, then the default hardcoded path.

width.description: The width of the login form logo image.

height.description: The height of the login form logo image.

aboutLogoSrc.description: The source of the about modal logo image for light mode. Falls back to srcDark, then the default hardcoded path.

aboutLogoSrcDark.description: The source of the about modal logo image for dark mode. Falls back to src, then the default hardcoded path.

width.description: The width of the about modal logo image.

height.description: The height of the about modal logo image.

theme.description: The theme of the sider. If it's set to 'dark' or 'light', the entered theme will be applied to the sider regardless of the site's dark mode status.

companyName.description: The name of the company or organization.

brandName.description: The name of the brand or product.
